data.title: CRH Completes LSE Delisting
data.description: In New York, CRH (NYSE: CRH) has confirmed the cancellation of its ordinary shares and 7% preference shares listings on the UK Financial Conduct Authority's official list and their trading on the London Stock Exchange as of April 20, 2026, at 08:00 a.m. The ordinary shares of CRH are now exclusively listed on the New York Stock Exchange.

data.title: Atlas Cloud Makes Seedance 2.0 Available to Global Developers -- Transparent Per-Second Pricing, No Waitlist
data.description: On April 20, 2026, Atlas Cloud announced the launch of complete API access to Seedance 2.0, ByteDance's cutting-edge AI video generation model. This move allows developers and businesses globally to utilize the model immediately, with no waitlist, minimum commitment, or regional restrictions in place. This offers a significant opportunity for sectors keen on leveraging AI technology, granting access to a powerful video generation tool.

data.title: Logile to Showcase Connected Store Operations at Retail Technology Show 2026
data.description: Logile, Inc., a prominent AI-powered Connected Workforce solutions provider, revealed its participation in Retail Technology Show 2026, the premier retail event scheduled for April 22-23 at Excel London. During the event, Logile aims to showcase the integration of forecasting, labour planning, and in-store execution on a unified platform. The exhibition comes as UK retailers face challenges from escalating wage expenses and stricter compliance standards. This initiative at Retail Technology Show will offer insights to retailers on enhancing operational efficiency amidst these industry constraints.

data.description: On April 20, 2026, a disclosure was made to Nasdaq Copenhagen A/S with the reference number 34/2026 regarding inside information.

data.title: DMEGC Solar Achieves EcoVadis Gold Medal, Underscoring Its Commitment to ESG Excellence
data.description: In Jinhua, China on April 20, 2026, DMEGC Solar, a prominent player in magnetic materials and renewable energy solutions, made a significant advancement in sustainable development on April 15. The achievement highlights their exceptional progress in areas of environmental conservation and social accountability.

data.title: Goldman Environmental Prize Honors Six Grassroots Environmental Leaders
data.description: In San Francisco, the Goldman Environmental Foundation revealed the winners of the 2026 Goldman Environmental Prize. This prestigious award, recognized globally for celebrating grassroots environmental advocates, was granted to Iroro Tanshi, Borim Kim, Sarah Finch, Theonila Roka Matbob, Alannah Acaq Hurley, and Yuvelis Morales Blanco. Each year, one individual from six main regions worldwide is honored for their exceptional contributions and guidance in environmental activism.

data.title: Preliminary data on early redemptions (prepayments)
data.description: An announcement was made on April 20, 2026, to Nasdaq Copenhagen A/S with the reference number 33/2026. This announcement contained inside information.

data.title: DEKRA Continues its Growth Trajectory Amid Challenging Market Conditions
data.description: In the commemorative year of 2025, there was a notable 3.4% increase in revenue, reaching a total of 4.4 billion euros. The demand for testing and certification services remained robust, showcasing continued strong interest in these offerings. The provision of independent expertise played a crucial role in fostering trust during a period marked by significant transformation. This information was disclosed in Stuttgart, Germany, on April 20, 2026. The market conditions were described as volatile despite these positive results.

data.title: Borr Drilling Limited - Invitation to Webcast and Conference Call for Q1 2026 Results
data.description: In Hamilton, Bermuda, on April 20, 2026, Borr Drilling Limited (NYSE: BORR) and (Euronext Growth Oslo: BORR), also referenced as "the Company," have scheduled the announcement of their financial outcomes for the initial quarter of 2026 post the trading session closure on NYSE set for Wednesday, May 20, 2026. This will occur alongside a planned conference call.

data.title: Roc and Kirsten Ramey once again make filmmaking a family affair by collaborating with their daughter Aria Isabella on a new short set to film in Summer 2026
data.description: In Atlanta, on April 18, 2026, indie filmmakers Roc and Kirsten Ramey announced their upcoming project to produce a short film. The film will feature their daughter, Aria Isabella, in a starring role. The Rameys, known for their independent filmmaking style, are excited to bring their creative vision to life with this new project. This marks a significant moment for the Ramey family as they embark on this venture together. Stay tuned for more updates on this upcoming film project.

data.title: IDR, Inc. Earns ClearlyRated's 2026 Best Staffing Firms for Women Award for Fourth Consecutive Year
data.description: IDR, Inc. is excited to share that it has once again been recognized on the 2026 Best Staffing Firms for Women list by ClearlyRated for the fourth consecutive year. The company, based in ALPHARETTA, Ga., received this honor on April 18, 2026. IDR, Inc. specializes in staffing and workforce solutions and is pleased to have achieved this recognition.

data.title: KTGHR leverages AI-powered real-time transaction capabilities to expand its e-commerce infrastructure, reshaping the engine of enterprise growth.
data.description: On April 18, 2026, in Dallas, KTGHR unveiled its latest B2B AI-powered intelligent solution designed to assist enterprises in adapting to the evolving global business environment. The innovation comes at a time when artificial intelligence is significantly impacting various industries. The new solution aims to aid companies in achieving holistic development.

data.title: New FCA-Authorised Credit Broker Gemini Launches to Bridge the UK's Small Loans Gap
data.description: Based in Bolton, UK, Gemini.co.uk has recently launched a range of short-term loan options along with a complimentary financial education library consisting of 28 guides. The company aims to cater to the vast number of British consumers who have been neglected by traditional financial institutions. This development was announced on April 18, 2026.

data.title: Spivi Announces Strategic Partnership with Les Mills US to Redefine their Group Fitness Experience
data.description: Spivi® has partnered with Les Mills to incorporate their renowned cycling programs onto the Spivi® platform. This collaboration will begin with LES MILLS THE TRIP™, RPM®, and LES MILLS SPRINT®. The announcement was made in Los Angeles on April 17, 2026. Spivi® is recognized for its innovative fitness gamification tools, and this partnership will bring the expertise of Les Mills to a wider audience through digital means.

data.title: If Oklahoma City Wins The Championship, Your Mattress Is Free!
data.description: Bob Mills Furniture is generating buzz in Oklahoma City and Tulsa by providing customers in these areas an enticing offer: a free mattress if the local basketball team secures the championship. This promotion reflects the rising enthusiasm for basketball in Oklahoma City. The deal, valid for residents of both cities, showcases the company's confidence in the team's success. This limited-time offer was announced on April 17, 2026, and has since captured attention due to its unique nature. Customers have the opportunity to benefit from a complimentary mattress valued at [insert specific amount] if the Oklahoma City team emerges victorious in the championship. This initiative aligns with the company's commitment to engaging with the community and supporting local sports.
